name: recruits
label: training
_note: Converted from the katmud_scripts.py 'recruits' script bot. Loot (get plate) and revalrie are handled by the bladesinger guild kill-trigger, so after_kill is left empty here to avoid double-looting; the post-kill revalrie hold is the guild setting post_kill_resume_text. Run skips rooms with a non-party player (look_player underline) or a skip_phrase. Start: -training (Run recruits). Stop: .stop / #stop / Run off.
